query:
SELECT 
  CASE 
    WHEN scoreMatch >= 1.0 THEN '1.00 (exato)'
    WHEN scoreMatch >= 0.95 THEN '0.95-0.99'
    WHEN scoreMatch >= 0.90 THEN '0.90-0.94'
    WHEN scoreMatch >= 0.85 THEN '0.85-0.89'
  END as faixa,
  COUNT(*) as qtd
FROM spread_analysis
WHERE dataReferencia = '2026-03-30'
GROUP BY faixa
ORDER BY faixa DESC;

SELECT 
  CASE 
    WHEN scoreMatch >= 1.0 THEN '1.00 (exato)'
    WHEN scoreMatch >= 0.95 THEN '0.95-0.99'
    WHEN scoreMatch >= 0.90 THEN '0.90-0.94'
    WHEN scoreMatch >= 0.85 THEN '0.85-0.89'
  END as faixa,
  COUNT(*) as qtd
FROM spread_analysis
WHERE dataReferencia = '2026-03-30'
GROUP BY faixa
ORDER BY faixa DESC;
